'''Kal Lup''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] who owned [[Lup's Wares and Supplies]] with her husband [[Tar Lup]]. Kal was nice and friendly to customers, but she didn't like anybody poking into her business.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'' {{Reprint|Tatooine Manhunt}} {{1st}}
